blended.narrative: Le Relais is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,701 ft. Looking ahead, 49 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 19" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
